items.title: Minister Ramalinga Reddy’s resignation issue resolved, says Chief Minister Shivakumar
items.summary: Mr. Shivakumar met Mr. Reddy for nearly two-and-a-half hours at a private hotel in Jayanagar late on June 5, 2026 night

items.title: Ebola spread in central Africa could match 2014 record outbreak, US health officials say
